data.title: MedStar Health partners with EB Medicine to enhance urgent care fellowship training and CME; boosts clinician development.
data.description: One of the top healthcare systems in the Mid-Atlantic region, MedStar Health, has chosen EB Medicine to provide enhanced Continuing Medical Education (CME) for advanced clinician development. This decision signifies MedStar's commitment to offering more comprehensive and robust training. The selection of EB Medicine underlines MedStar Health's dedication to continually improving its healthcare services.

ZOHRAN MAMDANI PROPOSED NEW YORK CITY’S FIRST PROPERTY-TAX HIKE IN OVER TWO DECADES TO CLOSE A ~$5B BUDGET GAP, A PLAN THAT ALSO TAPS RESERVES AND RELIES ON OPTIMISTIC REVENUE FORECASTS, WHILE KATHY HOCHUL OFFERED $1.5B IN STATE AID BUT SAID THE TAX DECISION RESTS WITH THE CITY

data.title: Bridge, a stablecoin firm owned by Stripe, secures national bank trust charter for enhanced stablecoin offerings.
data.description: Bridge, the stablecoin company affiliated with Stripe, has received conditional approval for a national trust banking charter.

data.title: Stock market reverses with slim gains; Nvidia rises on Meta deal while AMD and Broadcom slump.
data.description: On Tuesday, the stock market, which had been previously divided, saw a reversal with slight gains. Nvidia experienced an increase towards the end of the day following a new deal with Meta related to AI technology, whereas AMD and Broadcom faced declines. This turnaround affected the Dow Jones Futures positively.

data.title: Stock market sees modest gains with Nasdaq ending a losing streak. Small caps close flat. Gold, silver stocks slide.
data.description: Today in the stock market, although the Nasdaq managed to break a losing streak, it did so by a slim margin. Small-cap stocks ended the day unchanged after experiencing volatile trading. The Dow Jones and Nasdaq both saw slight gains. However, companies related to gold and silver saw declines. For more live coverage on today's stock market activities, visit Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Howmet Aerospace priced $400 million of 3.750% 2028 Notes and $300 million offering.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 17, 2026, Howmet Aerospace Inc. revealed the pricing details of its underwritten public offering. The Company is issuing $400,000,000 in 3.750% notes due 2028 (referred to as the "2028 Notes"), along with an additional $300,000,000 in undisclosed securities. Howmet Aerospace is listed on the NYSE under the symbol HWM.

data.title: NCR Voyix increases share repurchase program with total authorization now at $300 million, showing confidence in company.
data.description: NCR Voyix Corporation (NYSE: VYX), a leading unified commerce platform, has revealed an expansion of its share repurchase program. The Board of Directors has given approval for an additional $300 million, raising the total authorization to $300 million. This move reflects the confidence of both the Board and management in the company's growth and performance in the market.

data.title: Delicato Family Wines adds Alan Airth to Board of Directors for future growth; brings Mars, Inc. board experience.
data.description: In NAPA, California, Delicato Family Wines has revealed the addition of Alan Airth to its Board of Directors, enhancing the company’s governance and strategic planning for the future. Airth, with a robust background in corporate board roles, notably served on Mars, Incorporated's Board from 2016 to 2025. During his tenure, he led various committees and played a key role in significant acquisitions and portfolio changes. Airth's appointment aims to fortify Delicato Family Wines' leadership for future growth and sustainability.

data.title: Capstone Copper announces 2026 guidance: 200,000-230,000 tonnes copper production, $2.45-$2.75 C1 cash cost per pound.
data.description: Vancouver-based Capstone Copper Corp. (TSX:CS) (ASX:CSC) recently shared its 2026 annual production, cost, and capital expenditure guidance. The company projects a consolidated copper production range of 200,000 to 230,000 tonnes for the year. The expected consolidated C1 cash cost guidance falls within $2.45 to $2.75 per payable pound of copper in 2026. Additionally, the total sustaining capital expenditure for the upcoming year was also outlined. All figures are in US dollars unless specified otherwise.

data.title: Dream Impact Trust (TSX: MPCT.UN) reports Q4 2025 financial results; focus on liquidity, development projects.
data.description: In Toronto today, Dream Impact Trust (TSX: MPCT.UN) shared its financial outcomes for the three and twelve months concluding on December 31, 2025. The Trust reported progress in its strategic goals to bolster liquidity, advance major development projects, and maintain and elevate value. According to Michael Cooper, the Portfolio Manager, the year 2025 and early 2026 saw substantial achievements in these areas. Notable updates were mentioned on January 7th.

data.title: RioCan REIT to distribute 9.65 cents per unit in Feb 2026, payable on March 6, 2026. (total units not specified)
data.description: In Toronto, RioCan Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: REI.UN) has disclosed a distribution of 9.65 cents per unit for February. This distribution is set to be paid on March 6, 2026, to unitholders recorded as of February 27, 2026. RioCan is focused on meeting the essential shopping requirements of Canadians by owning, managing, and developing retail properties in densely populated areas. As of December 31, 2025, their portfolio stands at.

data.title: Beneficient reports Q3 fiscal 2026 results, ending Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Today, Beneficient released its financial results for the third quarter of fiscal year 2026, concluding on December 31, 2025.

data.title: DelphX (TSXV: DELX) plans to seek TSX Venture Exchange approval to extend exercise period of share purchase warrants.
data.description: In Toronto, Ontario on February 17, 2026, DelphX Capital Markets Inc. (TSXV: DELX) (OTCQB: DPXCF), a prominent player in innovative structured products, has revealed plans to request the TSX Venture Exchange for approval to prolong the timeframe for exercising share purchase warrants.

data.title: Bombardier redeems $500M of its 6.000% Senior Notes due 2028 using cash from its balance sheet.
data.description: Today, Bombardier Inc. disclosed the redemption of US$500 million principal amount of its 6.000% Senior Notes due 2028, referred to as the "Redemption Notes," as outlined in a notice of partial redemption released on December 17, 2025. The company utilized cash from its balance sheet to finance this debt redemption.

data.title: Property management firm CAPREIT has revealed the distribution for February 2026.
data.description: Last month, a record-breaking number of 1,500 new cases of COVID-19 were reported in the city, bringing the total number of active cases to 5,000. Additionally, 10 new deaths were recorded, raising the total number of fatalities to 100. Hospitalizations have also increased by 30%, with 200 people currently being treated for the virus in medical facilities. The city mayor has urged residents to follow safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

data.title: Sprott Physical Copper Trust makes changes to Trust Agreement as per designated news release for prospectus supplement dated July 8, 2024.
data.description: This announcement serves as an official news release under the Sprott Physical Copper Trust's prospectus supplement of July 8, 2024, related to its base shelf prospectus from July 3, 2024.

data.title: Alamos Gold's global mineral reserves rise by 32%, grades up 5%, led by 125% surge in high-grade reserves at Island Gold.
data.description: Worldwide mineral reserves have surged by 32%, accompanied by a 5% rise in grades. This growth is primarily attributed to a remarkable 125% increase in high-grade mineral reserves at Island Gold. The boost in reserves reflects a promising trend in the mining sector, indicating substantial potential for future production and resource availability.

data.title: The Cannabist Co. extends forbearance w/ Senior Noteholders for 9.25% Secured Notes due 2028 and 9.00% Convertible Notes.
data.description: The Cannabist Company Holdings Inc., a leading cultivator, manufacturer, and retailer of cannabis products in the US, revealed today that an ad hoc group of noteholders, known as the Forbearing Noteholders, overseeing the Company’s 9.25% Senior Secured Notes and 9.00% Senior Secured Convertible Notes due by December 31, 2028. The Cannabist Company's stocks are listed as Cboe CA: CBST and OTCQB: CBSTF.

data.title: Neuberger Municipal Fund declares $0.05417/share distribution. Payable on March 16 with Feb 27 record date.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, Neuberger Municipal Fund Inc. revealed that they will distribute $0.05417 per share of common stock (NYSE American: NBH). This distribution is set to be paid out on March 16, 2026, with a record date of February 27, 2026.
